story.iWant: DocumentGeneratorService'te cache ve retry mekanizmalarını entegre etmek
story.soThat: PDF/Excel generation işlemleri cache'lensin ve geçici hatalar otomatik retry edilsin

tasks.task: DocumentGeneratorService Dependencies Update - Constructor'a CacheService ve RetryService inject et
Environment Configuration - .env.example ve ConfigService config değerleri
Cache Key Generation - generateCacheKey() private method
Cache Check before Generation - generate() başında cache check
Cache Write after Generation - Successful generation sonrası cache write
PDF Generation Retry Integration - RetryService ile wrap
Excel Generation Retry Integration - RetryService ile wrap
Error Handling - Cache miss, cache write failure, retry exhaustion
Logging Integration - Cache hit/miss, retry, cache write logging

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: DocumentGeneratorService Cache Integration - CacheService ve RetryService inject edilmiş
Cache Check before Generation - Cache hit → return cached, cache miss → generate
Cache Write after Generation - TTL: 1 hour, DOCUMENT_CACHE_TTL ile configurable
Cache Write Failure Handling - Non-blocking, log warning
PDF Generation Retry Integration - Puppeteer PDF generation RetryService ile wrap
Excel Generation Retry Integration - Excel generation RetryService ile wrap
Error Handling - Cache miss, generation failure, retry exhausted, cache write failure
Logging - Cache hit/miss, generation, retry attempts, cache write
Unit Tests - Cache hit/miss, retry scenarios, cache write failure
Integration Tests - End-to-end PDF/Excel with cache/retry

doc.title: Epic 6.5: Document Generator Cache & Retry
doc.snippet: Integration of CacheService and RetryService into DocumentGeneratorService. Cache-Aside pattern with cache check before generation and cache write after successful generation. Retry pattern for Puppeteer PDF and Excel generation operations.

doc.title: Tech Spec Epic 6.5
doc.snippet: CacheService integration with SHA-256 hash-based cache keys. RetryService integration with exponential backoff (2^(attempt-1) * baseDelay). Configuration via environment variables (DOCUMENT_CACHE_TTL, DOCUMENT_RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS, DOCUMENT_RETRY_BASE_DELAY).

doc.title: Story 6.5-1: Common Cache Service (SHA-256 Hash-Based)
doc.snippet: CacheService.generateCacheKey() for consistent cache key generation. CacheService.get<T>() for cache retrieval (null on miss). CacheService.set<T>() for cache write with TTL. Graceful error handling with non-blocking cache write failures.

doc.title: Story 6.5-2: Common Retry Service (Exponential Backoff)
doc.snippet: RetryService.executeWithRetry() wraps async operations. Retry options: maxAttempts (default 3), baseDelay (default 1000ms), context string for logging. Exponential backoff delay sequence: 0ms → 1000ms → 2000ms → 4000ms.

artifact.reason: Main service to integrate cache and retry mechanisms. Already has CacheService and RetryService as optional dependencies via @Optional and @Inject decorators. Need to implement cache check before generation and cache write after successful generation, wrap Puppeteer and Excel generation with retry logic.
Generic cache service from Story 6.5-1. Provides generateCacheKey(), get<T>(), and set<T>() methods. SHA-256 hash-based key generation with consistent hashing. Default TTL: 1 hour (3600000ms).
Generic retry service from Story 6.5-2. Provides executeWithRetry() method with exponential backoff. Default max attempts: 3, base delay: 1000ms. Context-based logging for debugging.
Interface definition for cache service dependency injection
Interface definition for retry service dependency injection
Existing unit test file to update with cache and retry test scenarios

constraints.constraint: Service Integration Pattern: DocumentGeneratorService must use dependency injection for CacheService and RetryService via @Optional and @Inject decorators (already implemented)
Cache-Aside Pattern: Check cache before generation (cache hit → return cached, cache miss → generate), write to cache after successful generation (non-blocking)
Cache Key Format: document:{format}:{templateName}:{dataHash} using CacheService.generateCacheKey() with SHA-256 hashing
Retry Pattern: Wrap external/expensive operations (Puppeteer PDF generation, Excel generation) with RetryService.executeWithRetry()
Non-blocking Cache Writes: Cache write failures must log warning but not fail generation (try-catch wrapper)
Configuration Management: Environment variables DOCUMENT_CACHE_TTL, DOCUMENT_RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS, DOCUMENT_RETRY_BASE_DELAY with default fallback values
Error Handling: Cache miss returns null (normal flow), generation failures throw existing exceptions, retry exhausted throws last error
Import Organization: 8-group import order - Libraries → DTOs → Services → Repositories → Entities → Interfaces → Enums → Events
Testing: Arrange-Act-Assert pattern, mock CacheService and RetryService, verify cache/retry calls and logging

interface.name: CacheService.set
interface.signature: set<T>(key: string, value: T, ttl?: number): Promise<void>

interface.name: RetryOptions
interface.signature: { maxAttempts?: number; baseDelay?: number; context?: string; onRetry?: (attempt: number, error: any) => void; }

interface.name: GenerationResult
interface.signature: { url: string; format: string; size: number; }

tests.standards: Testing follows Arrange-Act-Assert pattern with Jest framework. Unit tests use mocking for dependencies (CacheService, RetryService) to isolate DocumentGeneratorService logic. Integration tests verify end-to-end cache and retry behavior with real service instances. Test files use .spec.ts extension for unit tests and .integration-spec.ts for integration tests. Coverage requirements: all acceptance criteria must have corresponding test scenarios.

ideas.idea: Unit Test: Cache hit scenario - Mock CacheService.get() to return cached result, verify DocumentGeneratorService returns cached value without calling generation logic
Unit Test: Cache miss scenario - Mock CacheService.get() to return null, verify DocumentGeneratorService proceeds with generation and calls CacheService.set() after success
Unit Test: PDF generation retry - Mock Puppeteer to fail twice then succeed, verify RetryService.executeWithRetry() is called with correct options (maxAttempts: 3, baseDelay: 1000ms)
Unit Test: Excel generation retry - Mock ExcelAdapter to fail twice then succeed, verify RetryService.executeWithRetry() handles retry correctly
Unit Test: Retry exhaustion - Mock operation to always fail, verify error is thrown after max attempts and includes context information
Unit Test: Cache write failure - Mock CacheService.set() to throw error, verify generation continues successfully and warning is logged (non-blocking)
Integration Test: PDF generation with cache miss - Real CacheService and RetryService, verify full workflow from cache check to S3 upload to cache write
Integration Test: PDF generation with cache hit - Generate PDF twice, verify second call returns cached result without regeneration
Integration Test: Excel generation with cache miss - Real services, verify Excel generation workflow with cache integration
Integration Test: Excel generation with cache hit - Generate Excel twice, verify caching works correctly
Integration Test: Retry integration - Simulate transient failure, verify RetryService successfully retries and completes operation
